title: Lock the canonical path identity contract and no-absolute-path boundary
summary: Define where absolute paths may exist, where only repo-relative paths are allowed, and where anchors must replace raw paths entirely across tracked state, shared runtime, and local runtime.

acceptance.label: Specs and contracts explicitly state that tracked `.prism` and shared/logical runtime data must not persist absolute filesystem paths
The canonical identity model distinguishes file ids, repo-relative paths, anchors, and local derived absolute paths without ambiguity
